property.name: orgId
property.label: Org ID
property.description: 18-character Salesforce Org ID from the deployment Code Snippet.

property.name: deploymentApiName
property.label: Deployment API Name
property.description: Embedded Service Deployment API Name from the Code Snippet.

property.name: siteUrl
property.label: Site URL
property.description: Experience Cloud site base URL (e.g. https://yourdomain.my.site.com/your-site). No trailing slash.

property.name: scrt2Url
property.label: SCRT URL
property.description: SCRT URL from the Code Snippet (e.g. https://yourdomain.my.salesforce-scrt.com). Leave blank if not in your snippet.

property.name: bootstrapScriptUrl
property.label: Bootstrap Script URL
property.description: Override URL for the bootstrap script. Leave blank to auto-derive from Site URL.

property.name: chatHeight
property.label: Chat Height
property.description: CSS height of the chat container (e.g. 550px, 80vh). Minimum 400px. Default 550px.

property.name: enableDebugLogs
property.label: Enable Debug Logs
property.description: Logs lifecycle events to the browser console for troubleshooting.

property.name: showCannedPrompts
property.label: Show Canned Prompts
property.description: Show canned prompt buttons below the input field. Button labels are sourced from custom labels HAA_canned_prompt_one, HAA_canned_prompt_two, and HAA_canned_prompt_three. Set a label to 'skip' to hide that button.
